metadata.title: Rene Llapur — Portfolio
metadata.description: Senior Frontend Engineer with 12+ years of experience building high-availability applications for finance, education and enterprise. Angular, React, Next.js, AI integration.
metadata.keywords: Rene Llapur, Senior Frontend Engineer, Angular, React, Next.js, NgRx, TypeScript, Clean Architecture, AI integration, Uruguay

hero.title: Senior
hero.tagline: I build high-availability web platforms for millions of users. Expert in Angular, React, and clean architecture — with a passion for performance, mentoring and AI-powered experiences.

about.title: About me
about.lead: 12+ years shipping production software for financial, educational and enterprise platforms.
about.body: I'm a Senior Software Engineer who bridges technical excellence and business outcomes. From AngularJS migrations to AI-powered validation assistants, I design systems that scale. I'm a Google Developer Expert and Microsoft MVP, speaker at Angular meetups, and a committed mentor — I've conducted 20+ technical interviews and shaped onboarding roadmaps for senior and junior hires.

architecture.title: Clean Architecture
architecture.body: Hexagonal, Screaming Architecture, Atomic Design, and Container-Presentational patterns. I design systems that evolve, not break.

performance.title: Performance First
performance.body: 30% LCP improvements, 25% API latency reduction, 100% code coverage. Core Web Vitals and state management done right.

mentoring.title: Teaching & Community
mentoring.body: Speaker at Angular meetups, GDE & MVP. Concepts over code — I help engineers build the foundations that actually matter.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: 12+ years across finance, education, government and enterprise.

highlights: Led development of Verifone's Merchant Order Portal — the world's #1 POS provider — serving millions of users via Microfrontends + Monorepo architecture and a shared Design System.
Architected a hybrid SSO integrating Azure AD, Radius and MFA (TOTP) via AWS Cognito, cutting user onboarding time by 40%.
Delivered 30% LCP improvement and 25% lower API latency through NgRx state management and Core Web Vitals strategies.
Designed AI-powered validation assistants with real-time streaming, reducing B2B configuration errors by 30% and support tickets by 50%.
Migrated a business-critical AngularJS app to the latest Angular version with zero regressions.
Conducted 20+ technical interviews and designed the onboarding roadmap for new senior and junior hires.
Built modular interfaces for Frame Banking™ with 60% code reusability via shared Angular component libraries.
Delivered mission-critical platforms for BTG Pactual and Santander supporting 100,000+ daily transactions.
Improved response times by 25% through NgRx and API optimization.
Modernized legacy banking systems from Angular 5 to the latest versions with 100% code coverage.
Led development of the Ceibal Student Portal, enhancing digital learning for students across Uruguay.
Owned end-to-end delivery: database schemas, REST APIs, UI flows and unit/integration testing.
Delivered and maintained 15+ web portals for Cuban national ministries (MINCEX, MINCOM).
Programmed and designed technical E-books for the Editorial of Medical Sciences with cross-device accessibility.

projects.title: Featured projects
projects.subtitle: Selected production work across fintech, insurance, banking and government.

miAuto.title: MiAuto — SBI Uruguay
miAuto.summary: Vehicle insurance management platform for SBI Uruguay. End-to-end policy lifecycle, real-time pricing engine and customer self-service portal.

paseLibre.title: Pase Libre — Transit Management
paseLibre.summary: National transit pass management system for Uruguay. Role-based admin panel handling benefit eligibility, user onboarding and reporting.

verifone.title: Verifone Merchant Order Portal
verifone.summary: Microfrontends architecture for the world's #1 POS provider. Millions of users, shared Design System, hybrid SSO and AI-powered validation.

bcie.title: BCIE — Central American Bank
bcie.summary: Institutional web platform for the Central American Bank for Economic Integration. Multi-language portal serving 15 member nations.

bancoEstado.title: BancoEstado — Chile
bancoEstado.summary: Public-facing web platform for Chile's state-owned bank. High-traffic, accessibility-compliant portal serving millions of Chilean citizens.

tata.title: TATA Suppliers Portal
tata.summary: B2B supplier management portal for TATA Uruguay. Streamlined procurement workflows, invoice tracking and vendor onboarding.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: The tools and practices I reach for every day.

talks.title: Talks & Community
talks.subtitle: Sharing knowledge with the Angular and frontend community.

items.title: OpenAI APIs in Angular — Models, Integration & Efficient Usage
items.description: Live demo and deep dive into integrating OpenAI APIs in an Angular project — covering each available model, their trade-offs, and strategies for efficient, cost-aware usage in production apps.

contact.title: Let's build something great
contact.subtitle: Open to senior frontend, full-stack and tech lead roles. Remote-friendly.
